requirements.task_name: Buy the most powerful 3-axis CNC mill under $60,000 with at least 800x400 mm table and 4+ stars
requirements.task_description: Filter CNC milling machines and add the single most powerful qualifying model to the cart with quantity 1.

requirements.task_name: Configure an entry-level CNC mill under $45,000 with ≥7.5 kW spindle, ATC, and coolant system and request a quote
requirements.task_description: Use the configurator to build a machine with specific options and submit a quote request under a price cap.

requirements.task_name: Order two replacement main spindles for a ProMill 500 (2022) that are in stock and the cheapest available
requirements.task_description: Find the correct main spindle spare part for a specific machine/year, ensure it is in stock and cheapest, and add quantity 2 to cart.

requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest online beginner CNC training course starting after September 1, 2024
requirements.task_description: Filter training courses and register for the earliest qualifying online beginner course after a given date.

requirements.task_name: Contact the nearest authorized service dealer within 100 km of ZIP code 60601
requirements.task_description: Use the dealer locator to find authorized service centers within a radius and send a message to the nearest one.

requirements.task_name: Download the English user manual and safety instructions for the VMC 850 machining center
requirements.task_description: Navigate support downloads, locate VMC 850, and actually download two specific English documents.

required_variables.set_condition: In the UI handler that is invoked when a user clicks a document's download icon/button (e.g., onDocumentDownload(documentId)): after looking up the document in the 'documents' storage (and, if needed, resolving machineModelId/modelName via 'machine_models'), if the document has documentType === 'user_manual', language === 'en', and is associated with the VMC 850 model, then set this flag.
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user actually initiated a download for the VMC 850 English user manual, not just that they viewed the listing.

required_variables.set_condition: In the same download-click handler (onDocumentDownload(documentId)): if the looked-up document has documentType === 'safety_instructions', language === 'en', and is associated with the VMC 850 model, then set this flag.
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user actually initiated a download for the VMC 850 English safety instructions. With these two booleans, the evaluator can verify that both required documents were downloaded.

requirements.task_name: Save the newest aerospace titanium 5-axis machining case study to favorites and copy its link
requirements.task_description: Within aerospace case studies, find the newest titanium 5-axis item, favorite it, and copy its shareable link.

required_variables.set_condition: In the UI handler invoked when the user clicks the 'Copy Link' / 'Share Link' control on a case study detail page (e.g., onCopyCaseStudyLink(caseStudyId)): after a successful copy-to-clipboard operation, set this variable to the ID of that case study.
required_variables.value_to_set: The caseStudyId of the case study whose link was just copied.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to (1) confirm that a copy-link action occurred and (2) verify that the copied case study matches the same newest aerospace titanium 5-axis case study that should have been added to favorites, using existing case_studies and favorite_case_studies data.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the cheapest maintenance plan under $200/month that includes an annual on-site inspection starting on October 1, 2024
requirements.task_description: Select the cheapest qualifying maintenance plan and submit a subscription request with a specific start date and contact details.
